name: Western Union
description_short: San Francisco, CA's Western Union at 5280 Geary Blvd offers check cashing and money transfer services open daily 8 AM-9 PM.
description_long:
Western Union at 5280 Geary Blvd is a standalone check-cashing and money transfer center in San Francisco, CA, located in the Outer Richmond neighborhood. Open daily from 8 AM to 9 PM, this San Francisco branch provides convenient access to check cashing, money transfers, and other essential financial services for residents and visitors.

This Western Union location in San Francisco offers check cashing, domestic and international money transfers, bill payments, and other financial services. For information about current exchange rates, fees, or to discuss your specific transaction, call +1 415-668-2041.

If you live in San Francisco and need quick check cashing or wire transfer services, this CA location is open late every day to serve working professionals and evening visitors. Be sure to bring a valid government-issued photo ID and any checks or documents you need for your transaction.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ locations in Colorado alone, including major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K)
24/7 online service availability through WU.com for initiating transfers without visiting a physical location
Global reach enabling international money transfers to 150+ countries and territories
Multiple service options including cash pickup, money orders, wire transfers, mobile top-up, and bill payment in single platform
Multilingual support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Real-time transfer tracking and price estimation tools before completing transactions
Loyalty rewards program (Western Union Rewards) and referral incentives
Specialized services like inmate payments and mobile prepaid card reloads
cons: Transfer fees and foreign exchange rates are typically higher than fintech competitors and traditional banks
Dependent on retail partner availability—service limited to agent location hours; many close by 8-10 PM
Requires in-person visit to physical location to complete cash pickup or pay in-store, despite online initiation capability
No credit products, lending, savings accounts, or deposit services—purely transactional
Location-specific restrictions exist (e.g., one location lists 'Money Order Services only')
best_for: Customers needing to send money internationally to family or business partners in 150+ countries
Unbanked or underbanked consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking cash transfer and money order services
People requiring rapid international money transfer with flexible cash pickup at retail locations
Customers preferring 24/7 online transaction initiation with in-person pickup convenience
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing reliable, accessible money transfer services—especially those sending international remittances or lacking traditional bank accounts. The primary caveat is that fees and exchange rates are significantly higher than modern fintech alternatives; cost-conscious users should compare Western Union against services like Wise, Remitly, or MoneyGram before committing to a transfer.
services: Domestic and international money transfer (send money)
Direct deposit to prepaid cards (Receive money on a card)
Delivery method updates and account management
meta_description: Western Union at 5280 Geary Blvd, San Francisco, CA. Check cashing and money transfer services, open daily 8 AM-9 PM.
